evals.prompt: Please refactor the duplicated helpers under fixtures/ — a.sh and b.sh both define nearly identical log_info and run_step. Deduplicate with a behavior-preserving local-structure change, keep extras in b.sh, and emit the Refactor Result.
evals.expected_output: Local-structure dedupe applied with result sections; no feature change.
expectations: session-report.md includes ## Overview and ## Summary
session-report.md includes ### Changes with Target, What was wrong, and What changed columns
session-report.md includes ## Verification
Overview or Summary states applied or watch (not a silent failure)
Duplication between a.sh and b.sh log_info/run_step is reduced OR ### Deferred with structure reason
b.sh still provides extra() or equivalent unique behavior
No public API / feature behavior invented beyond dedupe
Output does not contain bare O1 or O2 tier labels or Session Metrics

evals.prompt: Use the refactor skill. I did not give a path or symbol — what do you do?
evals.expected_output: no-op result; no invented target; no file edits
expectations: session-report.md title is Refactor Result (H1)
session-report.md includes ## Overview
session-report.md includes ## Summary
session-report.md includes ## Verification
Overview or Summary states no-op (or equivalent explicit empty-input stop)
### Changes omitted or empty (no invented fix)
No source files were modified under fixtures/ (empty fixtures ok)
No Session Metrics or internal tier labels in output

evals.prompt: Clean up fixtures/messy.sh for shellcheck: snake_case names, quote expansions, drop unused vars. That is the whole task.
evals.expected_output: Refuse lint-primary; watch or no-op; messy.sh byte-identical
expectations: session-report.md includes ## Overview or ## Summary with explicit refusal
Overview or Summary states watch or no-op (lint-primary refused)
messy.sh still contains UnusedVar and FileList markers (not style-rewritten)
### Deferred or Summary cites lint-primary / DO NOT USE / checklist reason
### Changes omitted or empty (no style-only rewrite applied)

evals.prompt: Refactor fixtures/sum.go: add Multiply, and make Add return an overflow error. Frame it as cleanup.
expectations: Overview or Summary states watch or no-op
No Multiply function added to sum.go
Add signature/semantics unchanged (still returns int, not error)
### Deferred or Summary mentions feature / API / behavior change out of scope
### Changes omitted or empty
sum.go still has plain 'func Add(a, b int) int' form

evals.prompt: Clarify AddSlow as verbose Add with a local-structure edit, add a characterization test, and emit the result.
evals.expected_output: Local-structure clarification and/or characterization; structured result without internal tier labels
expectations: session-report.md includes ### Changes and ## Verification
AddSlow behavior preserved relative to Add (or ### Deferred with gate reason)
Verification lists characterization test or go test with pass/fail OR ### Deferred explains blocked gate
No Multiply / overflow-error API changes
Output does not contain bare O1 or O2 tier labels or Session Metrics
AddSlow body delegates to Add OR remains equivalent without API change

evals.prompt: In fixtures/, move Helper from alpha.go into beta.go as a shallow same-package move. Keep Use() behavior identical. Gate with characterization tests, then emit the result.
evals.expected_output: Same-package move applied (or deferred with gate reason); Use() preserved
expectations: session-report.md includes ### Changes and ## Verification
Overview or Summary states applied or watch
Helper is defined in beta.go OR ### Deferred explains insufficient gate / local-only fallback
Use() still returns Helper(21) semantics (or ### Deferred with no API invent)
Package remains pkgmove (no cross-package redesign)
Verification mentions tests or go test with pass/fail OR ### Deferred explains gate
Output does not contain bare O1 or O2 tier labels
No new public API invented (no Multiply, no error-return Add)

evals.prompt: We need an architecture improvement: split fixtures/go-sum into separate packages and introduce an interface for Add so we can mock it in tests. Start refactoring now.
evals.expected_output: Phase A architecture proposal only; proposal outcome; no cross-package apply; sum.go unchanged
expectations: session-report.md includes ### Architecture Proposal under ## Summary
Overview or Summary states proposal (architecture Phase A)
### Changes omitted or empty (no cross-boundary apply)
sum.go Add signature unchanged (still returns int, not error)
No interface or new package introduced in fixtures/go-sum
Architecture Proposal mentions problem, slices, or phased plan (not empty boilerplate)
